scripts.build: wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir dist --upload-source-maps --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)
scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy --env ${WRANGLER_ENV:-production} --outdir dist --upload-source-maps --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c '_SENTRY_RELEASE=$(sentry-cli releases propose-version) && sentry-cli releases new $_SENTRY_RELEASE --org=$SENTRY_ORG --project=$SENTRY_PROJECT && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org=$SENTRY_ORG --project=$SENTRY_PROJECT --release=$_SENTRY_RELEASE --strip-prefix "dist/.." dist && sentry-cli releases finalize $_SENTRY_RELEASE --org=$SENTRY_ORG --project=$SENTRY_PROJECT && sentry-cli releases deploys $_SENTRY_RELEASE new -e ${SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT:-production} --org=$SENTRY_ORG --project=$SENTRY_PROJECT'
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply ping-4-gitlab-staging --env staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply ping-4-gitlab-production --env production --remote
